About the Firm

Mahfuzur Rahman, Esq.

Attorney & Counselor at Law · New York State Bar

A Trusted Advocate
in Your Corner

Attorney Mahfuzur Rahman brings over two decades of dedicated legal experience to the Queens community and beyond. Born in Bangladesh and trained in the American legal tradition, he uniquely understands the challenges immigrant families and individuals face navigating the U.S. legal system.

His practice at Mahfuzur Rahman Law Office, P.C. is built on a foundation of integrity, personalized service, and aggressive advocacy — whether you're facing an immigration hearing, a family court matter, or need help starting a new business.

New York State Licensed Attorney
Immigration Law Expert
Community-Centered Practice
Affordable Legal Fees
English
বাংলা (Bangla)
Schedule Consultation Call Now

What We Do

Practice Areas

Comprehensive legal services tailored to your needs — delivered with expertise and compassion.

Immigration Law

Green cards, citizenship, deportation defense, family petitions, asylum, visas, and DACA. We guide immigrants through every step of the U.S. immigration system.

Consult Now

Family Law

Compassionate representation in divorce, child custody, child support, adoption, and domestic violence matters. We protect your family's best interests.

Consult Now

Personal Injury

Aggressive advocacy for victims of car accidents, slip and falls, workplace injuries, and medical malpractice. No fees unless we win your case.

Consult Now

Bankruptcy

Debt relief through Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy. We help you achieve a fresh financial start while protecting your assets and rights.

Consult Now

Real Estate Law

Residential and commercial closings, title disputes, purchase agreements, and landlord-tenant matters. Protecting your property investment in New York.

Consult Now

Business Incorporation

LLC, corporation, and partnership formation, business contracts, and legal compliance. We help entrepreneurs build strong legal foundations from day one.

Consult Now

Our Commitment

Why Clients Choose Us

We combine legal expertise with genuine care — delivering results that matter to you and your family.

Affordable Fees

Quality legal representation shouldn't be out of reach. We offer transparent, competitive pricing and flexible payment plans.

20+ Years Experience

Two decades of New York legal practice means proven strategies and deep courtroom experience across all practice areas.

Client-Focused

Every client receives direct attorney access, prompt communication, and a personalized strategy built around their unique situation.

Bilingual Support

Full legal services in both English and Bangla — bridging the communication gap for Bangladesh-origin clients across New York.

Real Results

Successful Client Stories

Nothing speaks louder than results. Attorney Mahfuzur Rahman has helped hundreds of clients achieve their immigration dreams — green cards, citizenship, and legal status — right here in New York.

Fighting for You in Federal Court

Attorney Rahman regularly appears before U.S. federal courts and immigration tribunals on behalf of his clients — bringing courtroom experience that makes a real difference in the outcome of your case.
